chatter: Honor is all I have left.
As good as I am with a bow, I promise you--I was better with a sword.
I bear my burdens as best I can.
I craft my own arrows. Each one, a meditation.
I do not wish to be feared, but to be left alone.
With each step, my burden lightens.
If we focus, we will succeed.
Do not dwell on the past. We must win here!
Let us turn defeat into victory!
What is done is done. We must move forward!
Do not falter now, and victory will be ours.
Let the balance of battle tip in our favor.
Soon our fate will be decided.
We will determine the course of this battle.
It is not my time yet.
The arrow returns to the quiver.
There is still much I must do.
This time, I will be sharper.
She has grown competent. (eliminated by Kiriko )
Few allies remain on the battlefield.
Reinforcements are coming. Until then, I am alone.
Will no one join me in this battle?
Witness the flame of my soul!
This time I will not fail!
The enemy returns from the grave.
I have come to expect his return. (enemy Genji resurrected)
call-outs: The odds lean heavy against us.
The enemy is here, but unseen.
Look the dragon in its eyes!
Clear your minds for one last hold!
Hold strong! Their time is running out.
Their time grows short. Do not falter!
Attack now! We are running out of time!
We don't have all of eternity. Attack!
eliminations: All lives come to an end.
Is that the best you can do?
You were foolish to face me.
Notoriety comes at a cost. (eliminating Ashe , Junkrat or Roadhog )
Your path leads only to loss. Trust me. (eliminating Ashe )
Good looks are not enough. (eliminating Baptiste , Cassidy , another Hanzo or Reinhardt )
Imagine what father would say. (eliminating Genji )
Why must I relive this loss? (eliminating Genji )
You were never my equal. (eliminating Genji )
I always suspected I was self-defeating. (eliminating another Hanzo )
Did your mother not teach you caution? (eliminating Kiriko )
Kiriko needs more capable friends. (eliminating Mizuki )
Careless, irresponsible boy. (eliminating Mizuki or Wuyang )
Fade into darkness. (eliminating Moira or Reaper )
Sorrow is no excuse for what you've done. (eliminating Ramattra )
Death calls for your return. (eliminating Reaper )
How foolish, to come at me with a blade. (eliminating Vendetta )
Curiosity got the better of you. (eliminating Winston )
Eh... We got there. (when only the final arrow hits)
No kill is truly clean. (when only the final arrow hits)
It was your fate to fall. (eliminating airborne enemy)
Keep your head out of the clouds. (eliminating airborne enemy with headshot)
You will soar no longer. (eliminating airborne enemy)
A magnificent shot, even for me. (long-range elimination)
The wind lifts my arrows however far it must. (long-range elimination)
Foolish to test my reflexes. (enemy uses movement-based ability)
Leap as fast and far as you wish; I will still seek you out. (enemy uses movement-based ability)
Not invisible to me. (against Sombra using Stealth)
The surge breaks upon the shore. (shutting down Orisa 's Terra Surge)
I leave a trail of red.
Like cherry blossoms in the rain.
Send all you want. I'll cut them down.
The dragon will never be sated.
They fall before me, one after another.
My enemies fall like... snowflakes. (while in Winter Wonderland event)
With this power, I could do terrible things. (while Nano-Boosted by Ana )
Don't you see?! I will do what I must!
They crumble like ash before me!
Our foes have fallen. Now is the time.
None remain to oppose us. For now.
I offer only what you deserve.
The thrill of vengeance... is brief.
You do not want me for your enemy.
I have saved you... this time.
It was my duty to save you.
I turned your momentum against you. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Fall from grace; as I have.
They say falling is like flying.
You are effective, I will give you that.
An undignified kill, but a kill nonetheless. (to Cassidy )
I feel sorry for the Hashimoto. (to Kiriko )
Such experience for one so young. (to Mizuki )
Anyone can kill with bullets. (to Soldier: 76 or Widowmaker )
interactions: Hanzo : I never asked my father his opinion of me. Now, he is beyond my reach. Ana : I'm sure he was proud, even if he never said it. Hanzo : How would you know? Ana : Trust me. I know.

Ana : I know that look. Mending an old wound? Hanzo : I wronged someone dear to me. The path to redemption is... trying. Ana : It's not pleasant. But you'll see it was worth it in the end. Hanzo : I hope so.
Ashe : From what I can tell, you and I are "simpatico" with how we like things run. Hanzo : For your sake, I hope not.
Baptiste : If you die, can I have your bow? Hanzo : No. I will snap it in half with my final breath. Baptiste : Aw...
Baptiste : Always looking sharp, brother. Hanzo : My arrows will never dull, as long as my will stands strong. Baptiste : I meant your hair, but nice to know.
Hanzo : Perhaps today, the dragon will be sated. Brigitte : That was so artistic! Are you a poet too? Hanzo : I was, once. Now I seek peace in other ways. Brigitte : Still sounds pretty poetic to me.
Cassidy : You know, that sake's not half bad... but I prefer a little bite to my liquor. Hanzo : How predictable. Such an unsophisticated taste.
Cassidy : I appreciate a man with traditional taste in armaments. Hanzo : Have you ever fired a bow? Cassidy : No, but you won't catch me with one of those pulse rifles, either.
Hanzo : You should focus on training. You waste your time playing games. D.Va : Why don't you give them a try? Maybe then you'd frown less! Hanzo : I-- *scoffs*
Doomfist : The Shimada could rise again, if you so choose. Hanzo : There is nothing to that name, but... pain. Doomfist : Pain... and a sleeping dragon. Wake. Him. Up.

Freja : A man like you could do well in my line of work. Hanzo : There is no honor in selling one's skills to the highest bidder. Freja : Then I'll chase bounties while you chase honor. We'll see who prospers.
Genji : I live, brother. Why are you still grieving? Hanzo : You were not the only thing I lost.
Genji : It was not easy, living in your shadow. Hanzo : I would have preferred you at my side.
Genji : You cared too much about how the family perceived you. Hanzo : Have you ever been the eldest son?
Hanzo : I have always been bound to my duty. Now, I have nothing. Genji : There is always a way to make something from nothing, brother.
Hanzo : What are you wearing...? Genji : I could ask the same of you.

Genji : You left the Shimada clan behind. Yet, you continue to wield father 's bow. Hanzo : Try as I might, I have found it to impossible to let go. Genji : Of his expectations? Or his legacy? Hanzo : Of hope that I may one day be worthy of returning home.

Hanzo : Kiriko has grown surprisingly capable. But at times, her naïve perspective puts her in danger. Genji : Let her be. She must learn from her own mistakes. Hanzo : You would have me turn a blind eye after how long we left her on her own? Genji : Our absence is what lost us the right to guide her.
Hazard : You a good shot, or... is all you got there just for show? Hanzo : My arrow never wavers, and my spirit guides its path. Hazard : *laugh* Bit o' both, then.
Hanzo : Keep frowning, and you'll end up looking like me. Illari : You mean you weren't born like that? Hanzo : I was not. Were you?
Junkrat: What's on your mind, mate? Hanzo: I am thinking of what I have lost. Junkrat: What, your keys? Arrows? Snacks? I've got snacks. Cheer up!

Hanzo: Have you heard from your father ? Kiriko: A little. It's been harder to contact him since you escaped the Hashimoto . Hanzo: I did not wish to make matters worse for him. I'm sorry. Kiriko: *reassuring sigh* Don't be. I'm sure he's just glad you're back.

Hanzo: (one of two): Weighted like a stone. Blade, sharpened - yearns to punish. Strikes the final blow. Swifter than the wind. A rushing crimson river. Stains the earth with red. Kiriko: *groans* You're reciting your haikus out loud again...

Hanzo: The Shimada weapons were masterworks, but those ofuda were your father 's magnum opus. Kiriko: He made them for grandma when he proposed. Bringing the fox spirit to life really won her over. Hanzo: A sentimental, yet powerful gift. I see why she was impressed.

Kiriko: Is it true that my dad had to keep the fox spirit a secret from the clan ? Hanzo: Indeed. He was forbidden from crafting more anima avatars after forging our dragons. Kiriko: Why? You used them to help people. Hanzo: The scenes that haunt my memories... prove otherwise.
Kiriko: Do you think Genji will ever come back? Hanzo: Have faith, Kiriko. The years have changed us all, but he will return just as I have.

Kiriko: The Hashimoto run hourly patrols. We can sneak into the castle when they change shifts. Hanzo: I am... impressed. Your preparations are quite diligent. Kiriko: Well, I had to kill time until someone came back... Hanzo: Right. Then I will make your patience worthwhile.
Hanzo I hope your mother is well. Kiriko : The Hashimoto run our neighborhood now. So... Hanzo : Oh, I am sorry to hear that. Kiriko : Sorry enough to help?
Kiriko: My mom wants to know if you've kept up with the sword. Hanzo: I swore... never to wield a blade again. Kiriko: Mm. I'll tell her you're thinking of picking it back up.
Hanzo: Send my greetings to... Asa-sensei . Kiriko: You can say hi yourself.

Hanzo : You favor the lotus flower? Enlightenment, rebirth, and peace. Lifeweaver : Ah! You know the language of flowers? Hanzo : I know much that few would suspect. Lifeweaver : Perhaps you are not the nettle you appear to be.
Lifeweaver : I hear you're a poet. Shall we exchange couplets over tea sometime? Hanzo : I would sooner exchange farewells. Lifeweaver : Very creative! Hint taken.
Lúcio : Whoa, nice 'do! I respect a man who puts his hair up. Hanzo : It's more practical. And... quite dignified.
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Hanzo : The brave and beautiful koi. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Mei : I saw you carving wooden charms earlier. Can I see? Hanzo : I... have not honed my skills enough. Mei : Oh... Ice might be easier. Want me to show you? Hanzo : Uh... perhaps.
Hanzo : You Yōkai are surprisingly well-informed about the Hashimoto clan . Mizuki : Eh, that's all Sakura . Her intel's always spot on.
Hanzo : According to Kiriko , your instinct for countering the Hashimoto comes as second nature. Mizuki : Aww, she's complimenting my behind my back? Wish she'd be that nice to my face...

Hanzo : I hear you moved to Kanezaka fairly recently. Mizuki : Yeah, I was just looking for a change of pace. Hanzo : For one not from there, you are quite... invested in local matters. Mizuki : What can I say? Hard not to get attached to such a beautiful place.
Hanzo : I have heard of your experiments. There is no honor in what you do. Moira : Shimada... where do I know that name from? Oh, that's right... the family of criminals.
Orisa: I see you glancing at me. You wish to ride me into battle. Hanzo: I- What a preposterous thought! Orisa: Do not lie, archer. It is beneath you.
Pharah : Why not fire arrows that explode? Hanzo : With enough skill and precision, explosives are unnecessary. Pharah : You saying I can't aim? *incredulous laugh* I can aim.
Ramattra: Is that... is that a bow and arrow? Hanzo: Yes. Ramattra : Are firearms not to your taste? Hanzo : They make killing too simple.
Sojourn : You can't act like a lone wolf on my team. Hanzo : Depending on others brings nothing but disappointment. Sojourn : Let's see if this mission proves you wrong.
Hanzo : Is... Murphy a lot to handle? Sojourn : Nah. Healthy snacks and belly rubs keep her content. Why, considering adoption? Hanzo : Maybe one day. When I settle down.
Symmetra : Why did you leave your organization? Hanzo : I could not bear being the man they'd made of me. Symmetra : How did you know it was the right decision? Hanzo : I didn't.
Symmetra : Your quiver is crooked. Hanzo : Ah. Thank you.

Vendetta : So this is how the last son of Shimada wields his legacy? Skulking about like a fannullon. Hanzo : The Hashimoto cannot go unchanged. It is my duty to protect my home from tyrants like you. Vendetta : *laughs* Call it tyranny if you like. At least my victory is absolute.
Venture: You'll like this one: How does a non-binary ninja take out a target? Hanzo: How? Venture: They slash them! Hanzo: I suppose I've heard worse jokes.
Winston : Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Hanzo : No.
Wrecking Ball : He wonders if you are staying out of combat. Hanzo : Of course not. Wrecking Ball : He asks why you left your gun at home, then. Hanzo : I will not be disrespected by vermin!

Hanzo : You like my brother did in his youth. Wuyang : Really? So was he handsome, charming. Funny!? Hanzo : He wasted his time fooling around instead of learning responsability. Wuyang : Oh. You act like my sister .
Zarya : Your pets are quite handsome. Hanzo : The dragons are not "pets"... but, thank you.
Zenyatta : I sense that your hardest battle is yet to come. Hanzo : Hmph. I will best any enemy, no matter how strong. Zenyatta : And what of the enemy within?

Hanzo : Each day, I grow stronger. Yet the man in the mirror never appears to change. Zenyatta : A mirror reflects only what can be seen. Hanzo : Your platitudes will not work on me the way they did my brother. Zenyatta : And yet, you sound just like he did.
map-specific: Snow... is so beautiful... until it is stepped upon.
I understand the path that Caesar took. But more than that, I understand his fall.
Assassins tracked me down here once. They regretted it. Briefly.
I should really visit Asa-sensei . *sigh* But I already know what she's going to say.
By my arrow, the Hashimoto will pay for what they have done to my home.
I have run from this place—from my duty—for far too long.
A less honorable place is difficult to imagine.
